summary: Sub-Terrestrial Wall phrase VERIFIED on dome site. Live check of https://john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html#win-064 (2026-04-21) confirms the dome uses the exact capitalized phrase: 'the Sub-Terrestrial Wall of the Closed Toroidal Ovoid creates a physical P-wave shadow zone between 104° and 140° angular distance from any seismic source'. The raw-text archive missed this because raw-text/02-wins.txt did not include the wins.html content; the curmudgeon's caution was warranted given the archive evidence but the phrase is real. Part 6 attribution stands; EXP-199 adds a direct link to the dome source in WIN-064 detail_evidence so future defenders cannot strawman-accuse us. Close ISS-1274.
